mapper.insert: INSERT INTO feed_post ( post_id, member_id, trip_id, content, image_url, view_count, like_count, repost_count, created_at ) VALUES ( FEED_POST_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{tripId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{content}, #{imageUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, 0, 0, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND following_id = #{followingId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO follow (follow_id, follower_id, following_id) VALUES (SEQ_FOLLOW.NEXTVAL, #{followerId}, #{followingId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM follow WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND following_id = #{followingId}
mapper.select: SELECT F.post_id, F.member_id, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(F.content, 4000, 1) as content, F.image_url, F.like_count, TO_CHAR(F.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as created_at, M.nickname, M.profile_image, T.trip_id, T.trip_name, NVL(T.total_budget, 0) as total_budget, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow WHERE follower_id = #{loginMemberId} AND following_id = F.member_id) as is_following FROM feed_post F LEFT JOIN member2 M ON F.member_id = M.member_id LEFT JOIN trip T ON F.trip_id = T.trip_id WHERE F.del_yn = 'N' AND F.status = 1 ORDER BY F.post_id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes WHERE target_id = #{postId} AND member_id = #{memberId} AND target_type = 'FEED'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO likes (like_id, member_id, target_id, target_type, created_at) VALUES (SEQ_LIKES_ID.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{postId}, 'FEED', SYSDATE)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM likes WHERE target_id = #{postId} AND member_id = #{memberId} AND target_type = 'FEED'
mapper.select: SELECT like_count FROM feed_post WHERE post_id = #{postId}

SELECT c.comment_id as commentId, c.post_id as postId, c.member_id as memberId, c.parent_comment_id as parentCommentId, c.content, c.del_yn as delYn, TO_CHAR(c.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as createdAt, m.nickname, m.profile_image as profileImage FROM post_comment c LEFT JOIN member2 m ON c.member_id = m.member_id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.del_yn = 'N' AND F.status = 1 ORDER BY c.comment_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_comment ( comment_id, post_id, member_id, parent_comment_id, content, del_yn, created_at ) VALUES ( POST_COMMENT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{postId}, #{memberId}, NVL(#{parentCommentId}, 0), #{content}, 'N', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE feed_post SET del_yn = 'Y', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM feed_post WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT post_id, member_id, trip_id, image_url, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(content, 4000, 1) as content FROM feed_post WHERE post_id = #{postId}
SELECT m1.member_id as memberId, m2.nickname, m2.profile_image as profilePhoto, m2.bio FROM member1 m1 JOIN member2 m2 ON m1.member_id = m2.member_id WHERE m1.member_id = #{memberId}

SELECT F.post_id, F.member_id, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(F.content, 4000, 1) as content, F.image_url, F.like_count, TO_CHAR(F.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as created_at, M.nickname, M.profile_image, T.trip_id, T.trip_name, NVL(T.total_budget, 0) as total_budget, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow WHERE follower_id = #{loginMemberId} AND following_id = F.member_id) as is_following FROM feed_post F LEFT JOIN member2 M ON F.member_id = M.member_id LEFT JOIN trip T ON F.trip_id = T.trip_id WHERE F.member_id = #{targetMemberId} AND F.del_yn = 'N' AND F.status = 1 ORDER BY F.post_id DESC

SELECT 'COMMENT_FEED' as activityType, '💬' as icon, '[Feed]' as metaInfo, (SELECT nickname FROM member2 WHERE member_id = fp.member_id) || ' 님의 피드에 댓글을 남겼습니다.' as targetTitle, pc.content as content, TO_CHAR(pc.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as createdAt, pc.post_id as targetUrlId FROM post_comment pc JOIN feed_post fp ON pc.post_id = fp.post_id WHERE pc.member_id = #{memberId} AND pc.del_yn = 'N'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'COMMENT_LOUNGE', '💬', '[Lounge]', '"' || fb.title || '" 글에 답변을 남겼습니다.', fc.content, TO_CHAR(fc.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), fc.board_id FROM freeboard_comment fc JOIN freeboard fb ON fc.board_id = fb.board_id WHERE fc.member_id = #{memberId} AND fc.del_yn = 'N'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'COMMENT_MATE', '💬', '[Travel Mate]', '"' || tm.title || '" 글에 댓글을 남겼습니다.', tmc.content, TO_CHAR(tmc.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), tmc.mate_id FROM travel_mate_comment tmc JOIN travel_mate tm ON tmc.mate_id = tm.mate_id WHERE tmc.member_id = #{memberId}
UNION ALL
SELECT 'LIKE_FEED', '❤️', '[Feed]', (SELECT nickname FROM member2 WHERE member_id = fp.member_id) || ' 님의 피드를 좋아합니다.', NULL, TO_CHAR(l.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), l.target_id FROM likes l JOIN feed_post fp ON l.target_id = fp.post_id WHERE l.member_id = #{memberId} AND l.target_type = 'FEED' AND fp.del_yn = 'N'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'LIKE_LOUNGE', '❤️', '[Lounge]', '"' || fb.title || '" 글을 좋아합니다.', NULL, TO_CHAR(l.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), l.target_id FROM likes l JOIN freeboard fb ON l.target_id = fb.board_id WHERE l.member_id = #{memberId} AND l.target_type = 'FREEBOARD'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'WRITE_LOUNGE', '📝', '[Lounge]', '새로운 라운지 글을 작성했습니다.', fb.title, TO_CHAR(fb.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), fb.board_id FROM freeboard fb WHERE fb.member_id = #{memberId}
UNION ALL
SELECT 'WRITE_MATE', '📝', '[Travel Mate]', '새로운 동행 모집글을 작성했습니다.', tm.title, TO_CHAR(tm.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), tm.mate_id FROM travel_mate tm WHERE tm.member_id = #{memberId}
ORDER BY 6 DESC

SELECT F.post_id, F.member_id, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(F.content, 4000, 1) as content, F.image_url, F.like_count, TO_CHAR(F.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as created_at, M.nickname, M.profile_image, T.trip_id, T.trip_name, NVL(T.total_budget, 0) as total_budget, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow WHERE follower_id = #{loginMemberId} AND following_id = F.member_id) as is_following FROM feed_post F LEFT JOIN member2 M ON F.member_id = M.member_id LEFT JOIN trip T ON F.trip_id = T.trip_id WHERE F.post_id = #{postId} AND F.del_yn = 'N' AND F.status = 1

SELECT m.member_id AS "id", m.nickname AS "nickname", m.profile_image AS "profile", CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow WHERE follower_id = #{currentUserId} AND following_id = m.member_id) > 0 THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END AS "isFollowing" FROM follow f JOIN member2 m ON f.follower_id = m.member_id WHERE f.following_id = #{targetMemberId} ORDER BY f.FOLLOW_AT DESC

SELECT m.member_id AS "id", m.nickname AS "nickname", m.profile_image AS "profile", CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow WHERE follower_id = #{currentUserId} AND following_id = m.member_id) > 0 THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END AS "isFollowing" FROM follow f JOIN member2 m ON f.following_id = m.member_id WHERE f.follower_id = #{targetMemberId} ORDER BY f.FOLLOW_AT DESC
